message:
Merge PR #2469: fix: reaper Sprintf bugs and missing schema guard

Fixes Sprintf positional bugs where dbName was injected into query strings
causing malformed SQL. Adds HasReaperSchema() guard to skip databases without
beads tables. Removes database-qualified table names since the reaper connects
per-DB via DSN.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2469
Author: EmundoT

Co-Authored-By: EmundoT <EmundoT@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
